verdicts.blocked: A required exact-head stage failed, exact-head identity is unavailable, or the requested SHA does not match the checked-out commit.
verdicts.productionEvidenceFailed: A production stage that was explicitly requested failed or remained unproven.
verdicts.readyWithAdvisoryGaps: All required exact-head stages passed, while production-bound stages were not requested and deployment equivalence remains unproven.
verdicts.ready: All required exact-head stages passed and every requested production stage passed. This does not by itself prove that production bytes equal the pull-request head.
